summary: Tested P3 (Wheeler removal) and P2 (Scenario Engine). Found 2 remaining Wheeler references in NotificationsContext.tsx (display text) and ~50 Wheeler references in localStorage keys across multiple files. Scenario Engine working correctly with all features: CURRENT PLAN FLOW visualization, scenario cards, Add Scenario, Adjust Scenario sliders (Budget/Investments/Retirement), comparison table, delta indicators. Personal mode unchanged with 5 tabs.

issues: 2 Wheeler references remain in notification messages (lines 40, 149) - should be Thompson/Halcyon
~50 Wheeler references in localStorage keys (wheeler_notifications, wheeler_mfa, wheeler_factfind, etc.) - these are internal storage keys, not user-facing but should be renamed for consistency
